poj: Chū-kim í-āu, góa lóng bô ài koh chia̍h-hun a.
tl: Tsū-kim í-āu, guá lóng bô ài koh tsia̍h-hun a.

english: goad oneself on, drive oneself hard, strive for improvement or progress
the ring, a contraceptive device, an IUD
strive hard without stopping, continuous self renewal
self strengthening and self renewal  self improvement movement
self sufficient, self supporting, self sufficiency
self salvation, rescue oneself (from evil ways)
offer to take the responsibility upon oneself, to volunteer
from antiquity up to the present
the boss, chief, take charge of
the authorities concerned, the agency which is in charge of (a program)
decide or solve (a problem) by oneself, self determination
to station troops, to garrison troops, occupation forces
qualifications and experiences (of an applicant), professional background
achieve self renewal through one's own effort, attain or develop a new way of life all by oneself, stand on one's own two feet
think of nothing but one's own gain, self profit, beneficial to oneself
have a general idea of one's own abilities or resources
make one's self comfortable, take one's ease
moisten, do good to, strengthening medicine or food
control oneself, exercise self restraint or self control, (in ethics) autonomy
self examination, review one's conduct, achievement
indulge in day dreaming, to be intoxicated by the joy of one's imaginary successes, build castles in Spain
militia corps, a team of citizen soldiers for local self defense
have one's mind made up, be determined
senior editor who edits a specific page or section of a newspaper
abandon oneself, give oneself over to vice
abandon oneself to a dissipated life, have no ambition at all
master and slave, master and servant
not to recognize one's own limited strength or resources, do something beyond one's ability
movable and immovable property, (in accounting) assets
grow and die without outside interference, stew in his own juice
create a school or style of one's own (said of a creative writer, painter)
decree the fated time of death, be destined to die, unfortunately, by chance, by coincidence
Unfortunately I was caught in a heavy rain on the way
hanzi: 真倒霉，來到半路遇到大雨。
poj: Chin chù-sí, lâi-kàu pòaⁿ-lō͘ tú-tio̍h tōa-hō͘.
tl: Tsin tsù-sí, lâi-kàu puànn-lōo tú-tio̍h tuā-hōo.

english: stare at, to gaze, look attentively, focus one's gaze on
be one's own master, take initiative
self renewal, make a new person out of oneself
benevolent, kind, benign, benignant (said of elderly persons)
report loss of documents, to the authorities concerned
reap what one has sown, suffer the consequences of one's own deeds
station troops at a place for defense purposes
This period I want to study alone
self surrender, hand oneself over to the authorities
instigate (a crime), behind the scene operator
the one in charge, the mastermind
May everything be as you wish!
narrate one's own story or experience
One must be enlightened himself before he can enlighten others
give oneself up, to surrender voluntarily
walk right into a trap, fall into a snare through one's own fault
main theme (of a writing or musical piece), main points, central thought, the gist
produce good children, give birth to good children
place where a particular military unit is stationed
destined, predestined, to ordain (as Heaven or fate)

hanzi: 萬事都是老天爺決定的。
poj: Bān-sū lóng sī thiⁿ chù-tiāⁿ ê.
tl: Bān-sū lóng sī thinn tsù-tiānn ê.

english: be pregnant as a result of love affair
pity oneself, to regret, to sigh to oneself
admit with regret that one is not so great, concede that the other fellow is better qualified
all the way through, from the beginning to the end
from the beginning to the end, all the way through
the subjective (as against the objective), main body or most important part of something
major function(s) of a drug, the physician in charge (of a patient or patients)
student government (of a school), public welfare organization operated by the citizens of a community
realize that one is on the wrong side
to determine by divine decree or fate, destined, predestined
attach great importance to, lay stress on, emphasize
self respect, prudence, be deliberate in
assertion, an advocate, to assert, to advocate, insist upon
initiative, take the initiative, of one's own accord
automatic, automatically, voluntary, of one's own free will
You must do your duties voluntarily.
poj: Eng-kai chò ê tāi-chì tio̍h chū-tōng chò.
tl: Ing-kai tsò ê tāi-tsì tio̍h tsū-tōng tsò.

english: cut off by cutting all round (e.g., sugar cane, the neck, a limb), cut off with a knife, not by one cut but with a sawing motion, beat down the price
teal, (slang) small naval craft for beach operation
painting done with ink and water
This kid is very difficult to raise, put him up for adoption.
hanzi: 這個孩子不好養，去吃別人的米飯，給別人當乾兒子或乾女兒。
poj: Chit ê gín-á pháiⁿ io-chhī, khì chia̍h lâng ê chúi-bí.
tl: Tsit ê gín-á pháinn io-tshī, khì tsia̍h lâng ê tsuí-bí.

english: Lisan or Wushe peach, Mountain peach
lower section of a river, lower level
inebriated, under the influence of alcohol
Time brings everything to light. (Lit. Where the water is clear, the fish are seen.)
water wheel, water turbine, a (water) mill
the crystal palace, abode of the legendary Dragon King
properties of particular specimens of water
This cup of coffee is too watery.
water for irrigation, water in the water canal
doesn't come up to the standard
place near a lake, sea or river
All Men Are Brothers, a popular novel by Shih Nai an (施耐庵)
water and fire have no feelings
Water and fire do not mix
image reflected in water, light reflected from water playing on a roof or wall
The water's up to my nostrils.   I've had it up to here.
hanzi: 水淹至鼻，再也不能忍，忍無可忍。
poj: Chúi im kàu phīⁿ-khang, bē lún-tit à.
tl: Tsuí im kàu phīnn-khang, bē lún-tit à.

english: pool of water, chuck hole in the road, a puddle
large wide mouthed jar for holding water
bad tasting (like water out of a bamboo vessel that has lain long in the water)
ghost of drowned A tempting B to commit suicide in order to take A's place by transmigration
bad company getting you onto trouble (Lit. water ghost encouraging individual to jump into water and drown)
dead body flowing in the water
aquatic plant with violet colored flowers
From America to here is a voyage of three weeks.
hanzi: 美國到這兒由水路（坐船）要三個禮拜。
poj: Bí-kok kàu chia ū saⁿ lé-pài ê chúi-lō͘.
tl: Bí-kok kàu tsia ū sann lé-pài ê tsuí-lōo.

english: Stones come into view with a drop in the water line (literally)  The truth comes to light eventually.
The old drunkard is not really interested in wine.  be secretly interested in something while pretending to show interest in another
poj: Chùi-ong chi ì put chāi chiú.
tl: Tsuì-ong tsi ì put tsāi tsiú.

english: white cloth over the dead body in the coffin
hanzi: 蓋在屍體上的被單（白布）

english: floating weed like duck weed (eaten by ducks)
unpredictable temperament, water condition (of a river, as affecting swimming)
lead a befuddled life (as if drunk or in a dream)
so crowded (or so carefully guarded) that it is impossible even for water to seep through
water has been drained off, flood waters have abated
water tank, radiator (of a water cooled engine)
grasp the moon in the water  vain and ineffectual effort
water lantern, a paper lantern put in the water to guide the spirit of the dead
fail to acclimate oneself in a new natural environment, a new climate does not agree with one's system
make obviously futile efforts, (Lit. try to fish the reflected moon out of water) (literally)
aquatic rice (as opposed to hill rice)
honor, respect, venerate, to esteem, honored, honorable, respectable, noble
approve, to permit, allow, to grant, authorize, equivalent
level, even, rule, criterion, standard, accurate, (in law) quasi, prospective (bride, groom, member)
artificial watercourse or canal for irrigation (large than "kau")
live, exist, survive, remain, to keep, to deposit
turn (a wick, switch), to twist, wring
one gust of wind, breeze, or shower after another, one convulsion (disease) after another
obey orders, follow instructions, (response to an order) All right, Sir Very well, Sir
the back part of the water canal
survive or perish, survival and downfall
keep (a business letter, document) for future reference, to file (papers)
use in duly limited proportion (as money, food), be moderate
honor a person with an honorific title
the hold (of a boat or ship)
inform a superior or friend of what we mean to do
obey an imperial order or decree
regard (a person or thing) as, consider to be, to deem
honor, respect, hold in high regard
owner of a ship or boat
act in accordance with (a principle), put into practice (an idea, principle)
It will take care of itself when the time comes. Let's cross that bridge when we come to it.
certificate to take part in the examination
deposit, credit account, to deposit money
pole for punting a boat, a boat pole
ship left no wake, ungrateful, ingratitude
preparatory funds, (in banking) reserve, contingency fund
would be member, Savings club member of Credit Union
intention, intentionally, cherish something in the heart
respect the teacher and his teachings
preserve a copy or record (of a document), to file
bow or prow of a boat
the beginning part of the water canal
labor pains, throes, travail, paroxysm (of a disease)
colic, severe pain caused by cramps
older person, an elder, a senior
venerate, hold in reverence, to respect, uphold, to esteem
as a pledge, an article pledged as security between friends
ship's hold cabin, the hold of a vessel
receipt issued by a bank to a depositor, against which payment of interest and, or capital is made
underling, a soldier, suddenly, to finish, to complete, die
husk, turn a hand-mill, grind (into flour)
rub against or hook with elbows in passing, to elbow, to sideswipe, to jostle
large bath (as at a hot spring)
surpassing, outstanding, prominent, fine, distinguished, fine, handsome, English
put dust or ashes on (something), flying dust, raise dust, dusty
have one's great name tarnished or soiled
Out of a job and nothing to do but stand around and talk.
hanzi: 沒工作閒著啃雞腳閒聊.
poj: Bô thâu-lō͘ êng-chhùi gè ke-kha bóng khai-káng.
tl: Bô thâu-lōo îng-tshuì gè ke-kha bóng khai-káng.

english: The hero has no chance to use his might. -- no opportunity to use one's talent(s).

poj: chún-pī thang èng-hù kín-kip ê sî.
tl: tsún-pī thang ìng-hù kín-kip ê sî.

english: spirits or souls of war dead (honorable)
I cannot make up a sentence with this vocabulary.
poj: Chit kù sin-gí góa bē-hiáu èng-iōng.
tl: Tsit kù sin-gí guá bē-hiáu ìng-iōng.

english: This bird flies, but it can not fly now (because it is in a cage).
hanzi: 這隻鳥會飛，但是現在不能飛.
poj: Chit chiah chiáu-á ē poe, tān-sī chím-má bē-tàng poe.
tl: Tsit tsiah tsiáu-á ē pue, tān-sī tsím-má bē-tàng pue.

english: This dog bites people, but now he can not go and bite people (because he is tied up).
hanzi: 這隻狗會咬人，但是現在不能去咬人.
poj: Chit chiah káu ē kā lâng, tān-sī chím-má be-tàng khì kā lâng.
tl: Tsit tsiah káu ē kā lâng, tān-sī tsím-má be-tàng khì kā lâng.

english: Flowers bloom in the spring. (It's their nature to do so).
poj: Chhun-thiⁿ nā kàu, hoe ē khui.
tl: Tshun-thinn nā kàu, hue ē khui.

english: the inherent permanent capacity or inclination of something (Lit. "Birds gotta fly, fish gotta swim.")
poj: Chiáu-á ē poe, hî ē siû.
tl: Tsiáu-á ē pue, hî ē siû.

poj: Chím-má lí ē ài khùn bē?
tl: Tsím-má lí ē ài khùn bē?

english: I want to sell this house, but I can not find any buyers.
hanzi: 這間房子想要賣，可是找不到買手.
poj: Chit keng chhù siūⁿ boeh bē, m̄-kú chhōe bô ē-chhiú.
tl: Tsit king tshù siūnn bueh bē, m̄-kú tshuē bô ē-tshiú.

english: jostling and pushing each other out of the way, very crowded
I know the meaning of this sentence.
poj: Chit kù ê ì-sù góa ē-hiáu.
tl: Tsit kù ê ì-sù guá ē-hiáu.

english: grind rice (mostly glutinous rice) for making rice cakes

poj: Chhit-goe̍h chhe sì ē-po͘ gō͘ tiám.
tl: Tshit-gue̍h tshe sì ē-poo gōo tiám.

english: No matter what, short people always have a more difficult time.
hanzi: 無論做什麼，身體矮小的人都比較吃虧。
poj: Bô-lūn chò sím-mih, seng-khu é-sè ê lâng lóng ū khah su-bīn.
tl: Bô-lūn tsò sím-mih, sing-khu é-sè ê lâng lóng ū khah su-bīn.

english: hit or rub against with elbow or arm in passing, to jostle
I hit the flower vase with my elbow and broke it.
hanzi: 花瓶被肘部撞到而摔破了.

english: I knocked over the bottle of beer.
hanzi: 這瓶啤酒被我的肘部撞倒的.
poj: Chit koàn be̍h-á-chiú hō͘ góa e-tó-khì.
tl: Tsit kuàn be̍h-á-tsiú hōo guá e-tó-khì.

english: an exclamation, very similar to the English "Hey".
If the kitchen would be a bit bigger, it wouldn't be so crowded for two people.
hanzi: 廚房如果大一點，才不會兩個人就窄窄的.
poj: Chàu-kha nā khah tōa-keng chi̍t-sut-á, khah bē nn̄g ê á lâng chiū e̍h-e̍h-kheh-kheh.
tl: Tsàu-kha nā khah tuā-king tsi̍t-sut-á, khah bē nn̄g ê á lâng tsiū e̍h-e̍h-kheh-kheh.

english: benefit, profit, advantage, add to, more
flow over, brim over, excessive, bring up
exchange, to barter, to change (places, jobs, owners, etc)
belch up a bit of gastric juices
Epistle of Paul to the Ephesians (Catholic)
bring up a little stomach acid, belch up sour stuff
rather, would rather, it is better, had better...
hanzi: 厄斯德拉上，下（厄. 上，下）

english: noble spirit, souls or spirits of the dead
the pleasant effect of a woman's voice (Lit. like an oriole singing and a swallow talking)
As soon as it begins to rain, no body has any work, not a thing to do.
hanzi: 一下雨，每個人都沒有工作，閒得很.
poj: Chi̍t-ē lo̍h-hō͘, ta̍k ê lâng mā bô khang-khòe, êng-sian-sian.
tl: Tsi̍t-ē lo̍h-hōo, ta̍k ê lâng mā bô khang-khuè, îng-sian-sian.

english: The thread of this screw is worn out.
hanzi: 這個螺絲沒有螺齒（螺絲紋磨光了）。
poj: Chit ki lô͘-si bô gâ (gâ ui-khì).
tl: Tsit ki lôo-si bô gâ (gâ ui-khì).

english: This kind of drug injures the stomach.
poj: Chit khoán io̍h-á ē gāi ūi-tn̂g.
tl: Tsit khuán io̍h-á ē gāi uī-tn̂g.

english: The best friends sometimes have a falling out. (Lit. Some times the mouth and tongue hurt each other.)
hanzi: 唇齒有時會相礙，至友有時也會發生摩擦。
poj: Chhùi kap chi̍h ū-sî-á iā ē sio-gāi.
tl: Tshuì kap tsi̍h ū-sî-á iā ē sio-gāi.

english: It does not hurt, but I feel uncomfortable.
hanzi: 痛是不痛，就是有點怪怪的。
poj: Bē thiàⁿ sī bē thiàⁿ, kám-kak gāi-gio̍h-gāi-gio̍h.
tl: Bē thiànn sī bē thiànn, kám-kak gāi-gio̍h-gāi-gio̍h.

english: Look carefully when you climb stairs made of stone.
cannot bring to a conclusion, be put in an awkward position, be put on the spot
If the roof is low, it is very hot.
This room faces west, it is very hot in the afternoon.
hanzi: 這間房間朝西，下午很熱。
poj: Chit keng pâng-keng àⁿ sai, ē-po͘-sî chin hâⁿ.
tl: Tsit king pâng-king ànn sai, ē-poo-sî tsin hânn.

english: Smoking is bad for the health
He is making that much money but is still full of complaints.
hanzi: 一個月賺那麼多錢，他還在叫苦連天。
poj: Chi̍t kó͘-goe̍h thàn hiah chē chîⁿ, i mā iáu teh haiⁿ-haiⁿ-chhan.
tl: Tsi̍t kóo-gue̍h thàn hiah tsē tsînn, i mā iáu teh hainn-hainn-tshan.

english: May you make progress in your schoolwork.
do things by halves, skimp on one's work, do without any definite aim
eyes somewhat swelled up like after sleeping or crying
do things in a muddling manner
This sentence or word is full of meaning.
You are wearing that heavy a coat in this warm a weather, are you silly.
hanzi: 這麼熱的天在穿棉襖，你是在三八，是嗎？
poj: Chiah-ni̍h joa̍h ê thiⁿ teh chhēng hiû-á, lí sī teh hân-goān, sī bô͘?
tl: Tsiah-ni̍h jua̍h ê thinn teh tshīng hiû-á, lí sī teh hân-guān, sī bôo?

english: It isn't only Christians who are allowed to enter the church.
hanzi: 沒有限定只有教友才能進入聖堂。
poj: Bô hān-tiāⁿ kàu-iú chiah ē-ēng-tit ji̍p-khì sèng-tn̂g.
tl: Bô hān-tiānn kàu-iú tsiah ē-īng-tit ji̍p-khì sìng-tn̂g.

english: Shut your mouth! Close your mouth!
This is a gold and bass alloy.
poj: Che sī kim kap tâng ê ha̍p-kim.
tl: Tse sī kim kap tâng ê ha̍p-kim.

english: Don't you know that when someone begins to make a little money how soon they begin to criticize others?
hanzi: 一賺到錢，就很會諷刺人，你知道嗎？
poj: Chi̍t ē thàn khah ū chia̍h le, lōa gâu gê-sé lâng, lí kám ē chai?
tl: Tsi̍t ē thàn khah ū tsia̍h le, luā gâu gê-sé lâng, lí kám ē tsai?

english: laugh till the mouth is stuck in a smile
There is no room for doubt about it.
Nothing to do but have a few drinks to take up the time.
hanzi: 沒有事情喝喝酒做消遣。
poj: Bô tāi-chì bóng lim-chiú chò gī-niū.
tl: Bô tāi-tsì bóng lim-tsiú tsò gī-niū.

english: This little child is very sure-footed.
poj: Chit ê sè-hàn gín-ná kha chin giám-ngē.
tl: Tsit ê sè-hàn gín-ná kha tsin giám-ngē.

english: do not wish for, will not (rather a rude way of refusing)
Don't know what made his eyes look like he is frightened to death.
hanzi: 眼睛睜得大大的，不知在怕什麼？
poj: Ba̍k-chiu gîn-hò͘-hò͘ m̄-chai teh kiaⁿ sím-mih?
tl: Ba̍k-tsiu gîn-hòo-hòo m̄-tsai teh kiann sím-mih?

english: learn to improvise, use any means at hand, make do with what you have (Lit. When there is no ox to plough, one has to use a horse)
This medicine is good for colds.
poj: Chit khoán io̍h-á tùi kám-mō͘ ū hāu-lêng (hāu-le̍k, hāu).
tl: Tsit khuán io̍h-á tuì kám-mōo ū hāu-lîng (hāu-li̍k, hāu).

poj: Chit tè bah ē-tàng hē (khǹg) kàu bîn-ná-chài.
tl: Tsit tè bah ē-tàng hē (khǹg) kàu bîn-ná-tsài.

english: Just lay it down or put it down
His whereabouts is uncertain. Do not know his location.
not interested in, do not like to
This is merely a matter of form.
poj: Che sī chi̍t ê hêng-sek niā-niā.
tl: Tse sī tsi̍t ê hîng-sik niā-niā.

english: a show, an act of a play
A poor skipper blames the winding river.
hanzi: 不會開船，嫌溪彎，不怪自己能力差，反而怨天尤人。

english: We don't have any in stock to sell you.
poj: Chím-má bô hiān-phín thang bē lí.
tl: Tsím-má bô hiān-phín thang bē lí.

english: It's a pity that they have no money to buy rice.
hanzi: 很可憐，家裏沒錢可買米。
poj: Chin hiau-hēng, chhù-ni̍h lóng bô chîⁿ thang tia̍h-bí.
tl: Tsin hiau-hīng, tshù-ni̍h lóng bô tsînn thang tia̍h-bí.

english: Please sing a song for us.
hanzi: 請你唱首歌，給我們欣賞一下。
poj: Chhiáⁿ lí chhiùⁿ chi̍t tiâu koa hō͘ goán him-sióng chi̍t ē.
tl: Tshiánn lí tshiùnn tsi̍t tiâu kua hōo guán him-sióng tsi̍t ē.

english: The bill was voted down by an eight to three vote.
hanzi: 這個案子，八比三被否決了。
poj: Chit ê àn, peh pí saⁿ pī hió-koat.
tl: Tsit ê àn, peh pí sann pī hió-kuat.

english: Birds are perching on the tree.
All day I stroll around because I don't have a job.
poj: Bô thâu-lō͘ ta̍k-ji̍t mā teh hō-lò-hō-sō.
tl: Bô thâu-lōo ta̍k-ji̍t mā teh hō-lò-hō-sō.

english: The road to happiness is strewn with setbacks so don't worry about difficulties you run into when you are doing good work.
hanzi: 做事失敗沒關係，因為是好事多磨。
poj: Chò hó tāi-chì sit-pāi bô iàu-kín, in-ūi sī hó-sū to mô͘.
tl: Tsò hó tāi-tsì sit-pāi bô iàu-kín, in-uī sī hó-sū to môo.

english: promise plainly, make a verbal bargain
didn't make a verbal bargain about it
I'll give you this cake to eat.
poj: Chit tè piáⁿ hō͘ lí chia̍h.
tl: Tsit tè piánn hōo lí tsia̍h.

english: time passes very fast (Lit. Three years passed in a flash. Three flashes and a lifetime takes place.)
hanzi: 一晃過三冬，三晃過一生。
poj: Chi̍t hóaⁿ kòe saⁿ tang, saⁿ hóaⁿ chi̍t-sì-lâng.
tl: Tsi̍t huánn kuè sann tang, sann huánn tsi̍t-sì-lâng.

english: pot calling the kettle black (thief calling out "Stop the thief !")
saying nothing one way or the other
poj: bô kóng hoâiⁿ, bô kóng ti̍t
tl: bô kóng huâinn, bô kóng ti̍t

hanzi: 這句話一直重複，重複不完。
poj: Chi̍t kù ōe hoan-liáu-hoan hoan bē soah.
tl: Tsi̍t kù uē huan-liáu-huan huan bē suah.

english: win a person's favor, please some one
cannot manage it, quite beyond my power
one who aids a society without sharing its benefits
This kind of bottle is not recycled.
on the one hand...  and on the other...
This watch is shock resistant so a little bump doesn't hurt it.
hanzi: 這種手錶有防震，稍微摔到沒關係。
poj: Chit khoán pió-á ū hông-chín, sió-khóa siak-tio̍h bô iàu-kín.
tl: Tsit khuán pió-á ū hông-tsín, sió-khuá siak-tio̍h bô iàu-kín.

english: When asking a girl's name you must say, "May I ask your name?"
hanzi: 要問小姐的名字的時候要說請問芳名？
poj: Boeh mn̄g sió-chiá ê miâ ê sî ài kóng chhiáⁿ mn̄g hong-miâ.
tl: Bueh mn̄g sió-tsiá ê miâ ê sî ài kóng tshiánn mn̄g hong-miâ.

english: in an established or regular form
Who is in charge of this job?
poj: Chit hāng khang-khòe sím-mih-lâng teh hū-chek?
tl: Tsit hāng khang-khuè sím-mih-lâng teh hū-tsik?

english: This kind is relief work it is not sculpture.
hanzi: 這種的是浮雕，不是深雕。
poj: Chit khoán ê sī hû-tiau m̄-sī chhim-tiau.
tl: Tsit khuán ê sī hû-tiau m̄-sī tshim-tiau.

poj: Chit tiuⁿ phoe kā góa phah nn̄g hūn.
tl: Tsit tiunn phue kā guá phah nn̄g hūn.

english: If a tree is big its branches will fork out.
poj: Chhiū nā khah tōa châng ē hun-chhe.
tl: Tshiū nā khah tuā tsâng ē hun-tshe.

english: hard part of the pig's liver
There was great confusion for a time.
This plant ranges from China to India.
hanzi: 這種植物從中國分佈到印度。
poj: Chit khoán si̍t-bu̍t tùi Tiong-kok hun-pò͘ kàu Ìn-tō͘.
tl: Tsit khuán si̍t-bu̍t tuì Tiong-kok hun-pòo kàu Ìn-tōo.

english: The families are scattered all over.  All the families went their own ways.

poj: Chit chiah káu sī i ê.
tl: Tsit tsiah káu sī i ê.

poj: Chit chiah sī i ê káu.
tl: Tsit tsiah sī i ê káu.

english: having no relations to depend upon (as a widow or orphans)
intend to do..., be thinking of doing...
have no one to rely on, be isolated
poj: bô i-khò (bô i-óa) (bô i bô óa)
tl: bô i-khò (bô i-uá) (bô i bô uá)

english: as said above, as mentioned above
over the budget, an excess over the estimates
there is no room for doubt

leaving him with no ground to stand on, leaving him without any room for self-respect or respect from others (as by scolding or reproving him before those who respect or look up to him), corner a person
win a race, won a race
Does TV have any serials showing now?
hanzi: 現在電視有在做影集嗎？
poj: Chím-á tiān-sī ū teh chò iáⁿ-chi̍p bô͘?
tl: Tsím-á tiān-sī ū teh tsò iánn-tsi̍p bôo?

english: Give me a hand to erect this pillar.
poj: Chit ki thiāu-á kā góa tàu ián khí-lâi.
tl: Tsit ki thiāu-á kā guá tàu ián khí-lâi.

english: destinies arranged in a previous existence
postponed until as yet to be determined date
like a dog with its tail between its legs (said of a person very much afraid of ashamed)
As soon as you don't make enough money to eat, there are also children who will starve.
hanzi: 一沒有賺錢，一群孩子常常三餐不繼。
poj: Chi̍t ē thàn bô chia̍h, chi̍t tīn gín-á tiāⁿ-tiāⁿ mā teh iau-ki sit-tǹg.
tl: Tsi̍t ē thàn bô tsia̍h, tsi̍t tīn gín-á tiānn-tiānn mā teh iau-ki sit-tǹg.

english: not important, not serious, Never mind about that. It does not matter.
Before planting rice, the field must be flooded.
poj: Chhân tio̍h tāi-seng im-chúi chiah pò͘ tiū-á.
tl: Tshân tio̍h tāi-sing im-tsuí tsiah pòo tiū-á.

english: put one's hands on the hip joints, arms akimbo
cannot find a space to live in -- no place to hide
arrest all the crooks at once
uniform thirty percent increase in prices

poj: Chho͘-kang ê sin-súi it-poaⁿ chin kē.
tl: Tshoo-kang ê sin-suí it-puann tsin kē.

english: This cannot be completed in a short time.
hanzi: 這不是一朝一夕就能完成的。
poj: Che m̄-sī it-tiau it-se̍k chiū ē-tàng oân-sêng ê.
tl: Tse m̄-sī it-tiau it-si̍k tsiū ē-tàng uân-sîng ê.

english: have some idea of a fact
This flour is not very fine.
poj: Chiah ê mī-hún bô sím-mih iù.
tl: Tsiah ê mī-hún bô sím-mih iù.

english: no side profit or kickbacks to gain
This kind of fish is very tender.
You are at liberty to eat it or not.
poj: Boeh chia̍h m̄ chia̍h iû lí (chhut-chāi lí)
tl: Bueh tsia̍h m̄ tsia̍h iû lí (tshut-tsāi lí)

english: This ring is of good workmanship.
poj: Chit kha chhiú-chí chò liáu chin iù-lō͘.
tl: Tsit kha tshiú-tsí tsò liáu tsin iù-lōo.

english: You hands are greasy, don't touch my clothes.
hanzi: 手油膩膩的，不要摸我的衣服。
poj: Chhiú iû-lop-lop, mài bong góa ê saⁿ.
tl: Tshiú iû-lop-lop, mài bong guá ê sann.

english: You must live and die a Christian.
Smoking does our bodies only harm.
If we study too much vocabulary at one time, we will be thrown into confusion.
hanzi: 一次學太多生字會亂了。
poj: Chò chi̍t pái o̍h siuⁿ chē sin-gí ē jî-khì.
tl: Tsò tsi̍t pái o̍h siunn tsē sin-gí ē jî-khì.

english: unfortunate, as a person whose undertakings are always going wrong
not to be provoked, too powerful or vicious to be provoked or offended
Not to do what has to be done, but to work hard on unnecessary matters. (Lit. Not to scratch the itchy place, but to scratch a place that is not itchy until it bleeds.)
hanzi: 癢的不抓，不癢的抓得流血，該做的不做，不該做的反而做了。
poj: Chiūⁿ ê só͘-chāi m̄ jiàu, bē chiūⁿ ê só͘-chāi jiàu kah lâu-huih.
tl: Tsiūnn ê sóo-tsāi m̄ jiàu, bē tsiūnn ê sóo-tsāi jiàu kah lâu-huih.

poj: bē jím tit (jím bē-tiâu, lún bē-tiâu)
tl: bē jím tit (jím bē-tiâu, lún bē-tiâu)

english: I could not help bursting into laughter.
poj: Bē jím tit, soah chhiò chhut lâi.
tl: Bē jím tit, suah tshiò tshut lâi.

english: one of the leading figures in the political world
does not keep one's place (as an uppish inferior), does not attend to one's duty
spend money as soon as one gets it
poj: chi̍t chhiú ji̍p, chi̍t chhiú chhut
tl: tsi̍t tshiú ji̍p, tsi̍t tshiú tshut

english: As soon as he gets some money, he goes to drink.
poj: Chîⁿ chi̍t ē ji̍p-chhiú, i chiū khì lim.
tl: Tsînn tsi̍t ē ji̍p-tshiú, i tsiū khì lim.

english: As soon as I entered his home, I saw he was drinking.
hanzi: 一進門就看到他在喝酒。
poj: Chi̍t ē ji̍p-mn̂g, chiū khòaⁿ-tio̍h i teh lim-chiú.
tl: Tsi̍t ē ji̍p-mn̂g, tsiū khuànn-tio̍h i teh lim-tsiú.

english: This kind of cord is very strong.
poj: Chit khoán ê soh-á chin jūn (ióng)
tl: Tsit khuán ê soh-á tsin jūn (ióng)

poj: Boeh kā lí phah. Boeh phah lí.
tl: Bueh kā lí phah. Bueh phah lí.

english: I won't do it for you.
hanzi: 不要替你做。不要幫你做。

english: I won't buy it for (or from) you.
hanzi: 不要替你買，不要向你買。

poj: Chit chiah niau ē kā niáu-chhí bē?
tl: Tsit tsiah niau ē kā niáu-tshí bē?

english: be made a puppet of others
The carfare for a child is four dollars, an adult, twice as much.
hanzi: 車錢孩子四塊，成人加倍
poj: Chhia-chîⁿ gín-á sì kho͘, tōa-lâng ka-pōe.
tl: Tshia-tsînn gín-á sì khoo, tuā-lâng ka-puē.

poj: Che sī chi̍t ê ká-tēng niā-niā.
tl: Tse sī tsi̍t ê ká-tīng niā-niā.

english: Hold two suitcases under each arm. One held in the hand, one pressed against the body.
poj: chi̍t chhiú kâⁿ nn̄g kha phôe-siuⁿ
tl: tsi̍t tshiú kânn nn̄g kha phuê-siunn

english: This new watch must be checked to see if it keeps good time.
poj: Chit ê sin sî-pió tio̍h kah khòaⁿ-bāi le.
tl: Tsit ê sin sî-pió tio̍h kah khuànn-bāi le.

english: order and employ (in general, as servants, messengers)
The bottle does not go along with the liquor.
follow the lawful proportion for mixing (a few inferior articles in a lot)
Variety is the splice of life.
hanzi: 大魚大肉得蔬菜來襯托。
poj: Chia̍h-hî chia̍h bah iā tio̍h chhài-kah.
tl: Tsia̍h-hî tsia̍h bah iā tio̍h tshài-kah.

english: I'll give you this blanket to cover up with.
poj: Chit niá thán-á hō͘ lí kah.
tl: Tsit niá thán-á hōo lí kah.

english: Cannot speak English at all. Cannot speak even half a word of English.
Can't do anything at all. (Note: "kah" is used to emphasize "poa*-ku" and "poa*-hang")
Not wiped dry at all. (Note: "kah" is used to emphasize "poa*-ku" and "poa*-hang" Used after verbs indicates the past tense.)
This dish suits my taste very much.
poj: Chit hāng chhài chia̍h tio̍h chin kah-chhùi (chin kah góa ê chhùi).
tl: Tsit hāng tshài tsia̍h tio̍h tsin kah-tshuì (tsin kah guá ê tshuì).

english: I like this shirt very much. This shirt suits my fancy.
poj: Chit niá saⁿ góa chin kah-ì.
tl: Tsit niá sann guá tsin kah-ì.

english: The thief didn't steal my money, I was very lucky.
hanzi: 真僥倖，小偷沒偷走我的錢。
poj: Chha̍t-á bô the̍h góa ê chîⁿ khì, chin kai-chài.
tl: Tsha̍t-á bô the̍h guá ê tsînn khì, tsin kai-tsài.

english: If you don't want to plant rice you can plant something else.
People say that a person who likes to talk and talks very cleverly likes to boast.
hanzi: 很喜歡講話又很會講話的人，人都叫他蓋仙。
poj: Chin ài kóng-ōe koh chin gâu kóng-ōe ê lâng, lâng lóng kiò i kài-sian.
tl: Tsin ài kóng-uē koh tsin gâu kóng-uē ê lâng, lâng lóng kiò i kài-sian.

english: One who is going to be a soldier must be ready for hardships and privations.
hanzi: 要當軍人的人，得覺悟要刻苦耐勞。
poj: Boeh chò kun-jîn ê lâng, tio̍h kak-gō͘ khek-khó͘ nāi-lô.
tl: Bueh tsò kun-jîn ê lâng, tio̍h kak-gōo khik-khóo nāi-lô.

english: on the spur of the moment
This is a good day's work.
poj: Che ài chi̍t kang (chi̍t kang lâng)
tl: Tse ài tsi̍t kang (tsi̍t kang lâng)

english: I have a lot of work to do this evening.

poj: Chi̍t tè toh-á kap nn̄g tè í-á.
tl: Tsi̍t tè toh-á kap nn̄g tè í-á.

english: smelling bad (as filthy shirt or pillow)
This sheet of paper is thick.
The failure of this time is a very good lesson for me.
hanzi: 這次的失敗是個很好的教訓。
poj: Chit pái ê sit-pāi sī chi̍t ê chin hó ê kàu-hùn.
tl: Tsit pái ê sit-pāi sī tsi̍t ê tsin hó ê kàu-hùn.

english: Is this a true one or a fake?
poj: Che sī chin ê, á-sī ké ê?
tl: Tse sī tsin ê, á-sī ké ê?

poj: Chit koàn chiú sī ké ê.
tl: Tsit kuàn tsiú sī ké ê.

english: Is this a true one or a false one?
poj: Che sī chin ê, á-sī ké-iáⁿ ê?
tl: Tse sī tsin ê, á-sī ké-iánn ê?

english: This desk is not steady, put a piece of wood under the leg (and make it steady)
hanzi: 這張桌子不穩，拿一塊板子來墊腳。
poj: Chit tè toh-á bô chāi, the̍h chi̍t tè pang-á lâi ké-kha (ké hō͘ chāi)
tl: Tsit tè toh-á bô tsāi, the̍h tsi̍t tè pang-á lâi ké-kha (ké hōo tsāi)

english: One family has five person, four of them are female.
poj: Chi̍t ke-kháu gō͘ ê, ū sì ê cha-bó͘-ê.
tl: Tsi̍t ke-kháu gōo ê, ū sì ê tsa-bóo-ê.

english: pretend to be a learned person
Stay here over night and return in the morning, okay?
hanzi: 晚上住這裡，隔天早上才回去，不好嗎？
poj: Eng-àm tòa chia, keh-thiⁿ-kng chái-khí chiah tńg-khì, kám m̄ hó?
tl: Ing-àm tuà tsia, keh-thinn-kng tsái-khí tsiah tńg-khì, kám m̄ hó?

english: bamboo conduit for water (used in country places)
This store has an American proprietor.
hanzi: 這家商店是美國人經營的。
poj: Chit khám tiàm sī Bí-kok-lâng teh keng-êng ê.
tl: Tsit khám tiàm sī Bí-kok-lâng teh king-îng ê.

hanzi: 這間房子的隔間很好（不好）。
poj: Chit keng chhù ê keng-keh chin hó (bô hó).
tl: Tsit king tshù ê king-keh tsin hó (bô hó).

english: This is just an ordinary matter.
leg with a bad sore or ulcer
A few people get more work done, on the contrary many people accomplish very little.
hanzi: 人少工作效率高，人多反而工作效率低。
poj: Chió lâng chò khah ū khang-khòe, chē lâng tian-tò chò khah bô khang-khòe.
tl: Tsió lâng tsò khah ū khang-khuè, tsē lâng tian-tò tsò khah bô khang-khuè.

english: This type of a fruit tree must get a bit bigger before it bears fruit.
hanzi: 這種果樹得大些才能結果子。
poj: Chit khoán ê kóe-chí-chhiū tio̍h khah tōa châng, chiah ē seⁿ.
tl: Tsit khuán ê kué-tsí-tshiū tio̍h khah tuā tsâng, tsiah ē senn.

english: I am going to Kaoshiung rather early tomorrow.
hanzi: 明天要早一點到高雄去。
poj: Bîn-á-chài boeh khah chá khì Ko-hiông.
tl: Bîn-á-tsài bueh khah tsá khì Ko-hiông.

english: He is better informed on this matter, I don't know much about it.
hanzi: 這件事他較清楚，我不太清楚。
poj: Chit hāng tāi-chì i khah chai-iáⁿ, góa khah m̄ chai-iáⁿ.
tl: Tsit hāng tāi-tsì i khah tsai-iánn, guá khah m̄ tsai-iánn.

english: This youngster resembles his father more, he doesn't resemble his mother very much.
hanzi: 這孩子比較像他父親，不太像他母親。
poj: Chit ê gín-á khah chhin-chhiūⁿ in lāu-pē, khah bô chhin-chhiūⁿ in lāu-bú.
tl: Tsit ê gín-á khah tshin-tshiūnn in lāu-pē, khah bô tshin-tshiūnn in lāu-bú.

english: spend more than two days on that job

hanzi: 坐鬆一些！ 坐開一點！

english: Although this cup is very beautiful, it is somewhat more expensive than I expected (or than I can afford)
hanzi: 這個杯子雖然很好看，但是貴一點。
poj: Chit tè au-á sui-jiân chin súi, tān-sī ū khah kùi.
tl: Tsit tè au-á sui-jiân tsin suí, tān-sī ū khah kuì.

english: People say this more, they don't say that very much.
hanzi: 這句比較有人講， 那句比較沒人講
poj: Chit kù khah ū lâng kóng, hit kù khah bô lâng kóng.
tl: Tsit kù khah ū lâng kóng, hit kù khah bô lâng kóng.

english: This is a really bad child, no matter how much you beat him, he is still not afraid of you.
hanzi: 這孩子很壞，再怎麼打也不怕。
poj: Chit ê gín-á chin pháiⁿ, (koh) khah phah iā m̄ kiaⁿ.
tl: Tsit ê gín-á tsin pháinn, (koh) khah phah iā m̄ kiann.

english: This youngster is very clever, but somewhat mischievous
hanzi: 這孩子很聰明，但是有點兒調皮。
poj: Chit ê gín-á chin khiáu, tān-sī ū khah chhiú-chhèng tām-po̍h-á.
tl: Tsit ê gín-á tsin khiáu, tān-sī ū khah tshiú-tshìng tām-po̍h-á.

english: Tomorrow will be the opening of the new theater.
unable to endure, too weak to sustain, unworthy, dare not accept
can't last for a long time
There is a wound on the arm (leg).
seek an opportunity for injuring another
After all the baby birds have flown away there remains nothing but an empty nest.
hanzi: 小鳥都飛走了，剩空巢而已。
poj: Chiáu-á-kiáⁿ lóng poe-liáu-liáu, chhun khang-siū niā-niā.
tl: Tsiáu-á-kiánn lóng pue-liáu-liáu, tshun khang-siū niā-niā.

english: Please lie down on your stomach. (said by a doctor to a patient)
be jealous of, be displeased (out of jealousy)
Plane this board smooth for me.
hanzi: 請你把這塊 木板刨平。
poj: Chit tè pang chhiáⁿ lí kā góa khau hō͘ pêⁿ.
tl: Tsit tè pang tshiánn lí kā guá khau hōo pênn.

english: hank of thread, one length of thread
household or family (Lit. one cooking stove)
I'll buy a share in this company. I will invest in this company.
hanzi: 這家公司，我也要認一股。
poj: Chit keng kong-si, góa iā boeh hūn chi̍t kháu.
tl: Tsit king kong-si, guá iā bueh hūn tsi̍t kháu.

poj: Chit hāng mi̍h-kiāⁿ chò liáu chin kháu-biāu.
tl: Tsit hāng mi̍h-kiānn tsò liáu tsin kháu-biāu.

english: one household, said in speaking of the number of households in a village or town
connive, pretend that one doesn't see it
Make yourself at home. Help yourself. Please don't go to any trouble (on my account)
This food is all for you to gather up (and eat).
poj: Chiah ê chhài lóng hō͘ lí khêng.
tl: Tsiah ê tshài lóng hōo lí khîng.

english: There is a rainbow. a rainbow appearing.
The boat is rolling and pitching.
one perpendicular stroke and one horizontal stroke (as 十 = ten)
One of the books is missing.

poj: Chiah ê chîⁿ góa boeh khiām khí-lâi.
tl: Tsiah ê tsînn guá bueh khiām khí-lâi.

english: I don't know where someone stole the things I was sending home.
hanzi: 要寄回去的東西不知在哪兒被人偷了。
poj: Boeh kià tńg-khì ê mi̍h-kiāⁿ m̄-chai tī toh-ūi hō͘ lâng khiang khì.
tl: Bueh kià tńg-khì ê mi̍h-kiānn m̄-tsai tī toh-uī hōo lâng khiang khì.

english: This youngster is not well, so he is very peevish.
hanzi: 這孩子在生病，所以很乖張。
poj: Chit ê gín-á teh phòa-pēⁿ, só͘-í chin gâu khiâu.
tl: Tsit ê gín-á teh phuà-pēnn, sóo-í tsin gâu khiâu.

english: When the cat's away, the mice will play.
poj: Chhù-lāi bô bâ, niáu-chhí chiū khiau-kha.
tl: Tshù-lāi bô bâ, niáu-tshí tsiū khiau-kha.

english: go to the office, go on duty

hanzi: 這個孩子將來會無前途。
poj: Chit ê gín-á chiong-lâi ē khioh-ka̍k.
tl: Tsit ê gín-á tsiong-lâi ē khioh-ka̍k.

hanzi: 這塊肉可以留（貯藏）到明天。
poj: Chit tè bah ē-tàng khǹg kàu bîn-á-chài.
tl: Tsit tè bah ē-tàng khǹg kàu bîn-á-tsài.

english: There will be an exam in history.
There is no room for consideration.
It is regrettable that he died.
This (fruit) is not rotten, it is only bruised.
poj: Che m̄-sī nōa-khì, sī khò-tio̍h ê.
tl: Tse m̄-sī nuā-khì, sī khò-tio̍h ê.

english: Lit. one piece of silver ─ one dollar
muzzle, the circumference of one's mouth
Taste it and see if it is good.
Try to do it! Give it a trial.
I cannot tell the difference between a true one and a false one.
hanzi: 真的還是假的，我不能辨別。
poj: Chin ê á-sī ké-ê, góa khòaⁿ bē chhut.
tl: Tsin ê á-sī ké-ê, guá khuànn bē tshut.

english: I cannot set a high value on this kind of person (thing).
hanzi: 這種人（東西）我看不起（不上眼）
poj: Chit khoán ê lâng (mi̍h), góa khòaⁿ-bē-khí (bē-chiūⁿ-ba̍k)
tl: Tsit khuán ê lâng (mi̍h), guá khuànn-bē-khí (bē-tsiūnn-ba̍k)

english: I cannot understand the meaning of this sentence.
poj: Chit kù ê ì-sù góa khòaⁿ bē-hiáu.
tl: Tsit kù ê ì-sù guá khuànn bē-hiáu.

english: I don't know how to read this map.
poj: Chit tiuⁿ tē-tô͘ góa khòaⁿ bô.
tl: Tsit tiunn tē-tôo guá khuànn bô.
